dimensions.name: Peace Advocacy & Global Awareness
dimensions.description: Does the answer demonstrate genuine understanding of peace, conflict, or global humanitarian issues? Specific, not abstract?

dimensions.name: Diplomatic Tone
dimensions.description: Is the tone measured, respectful, and inclusive? Avoids polarizing or divisive language while still being direct?

dimensions.name: Directness & Clarity
dimensions.description: Does the first sentence directly answer the question? Is the answer easy to follow?

dimensions.name: Structure & Flow
dimensions.description: Does it follow a logical arc — answer, meaning, anchor, application, close? Smooth transitions?

dimensions.name: Authenticity & Specificity
dimensions.description: Does it sound real and personal, not templated? Uses contestant's actual stories and platform?

dimensions.name: Cultural Sensitivity
dimensions.description: Demonstrates respect for diverse cultures and perspectives? Avoids stereotypes or assumptions?

dimensions.name: Closing Strength
dimensions.description: Last line is memorable, quotable, and values-led? Ends with a call for unity or action?

dimensions.name: Credibility & Safety
dimensions.description: No unsupported statistics or risky claims? Would not embarrass the contestant on stage?
